goal: Stabilize player depth in V1 Terrain water without replacing native horizontal swimming.

implementation.movement_mode: Roblox native water swimming plus damped vertical depth hold without constant lift
implementation.touch_controls: Small right-side Up/Down buttons only; no custom movement pad.
implementation.gamepad_vr_controls: Right stick Y plus A/R1/R2 rise and B/L1/L2 dive.

acceptance_notes: Horizontal steering remains Roblox native, so Android/VR should keep their normal movement path.
When no vertical input is active, the script captures the current Y position and applies only damped correction, not full gravity-canceling lift.
Old custom movement scripts are disabled in StarterPlayerScripts if present.
Runtime behavior must be judged in Play mode; edit-mode bridge can only confirm installation.
